What We Make

Five Product Lines.
One Manufacturer.

Everything stamped, drawn or embossed in stainless steel for cookware — made in-house, to your specification, at OEM volume.

01
Induction Base Plates
Custom SS 430 discs precision-stamped and bonded to aluminium or non-stick cookware bases. Your diameter, your pattern, your edge profile — weld-ready and compatible with all induction hob standards.
Any size · Any pattern · SS 430 · Weld-ready
02
Pressure Cooker Components
High-strength stamped base plates and lids for sealed pressure cooking environments. Engineered for pressure and temperature differentials. Flat, dome and embossed profiles.
SS 304 / 430 · Flat · Dome · Embossed
03
Lids & Supporting Components
Stamped stainless steel lids with precision-formed rims — flat, dome and embossed profiles to fit standard cookware diameters. Ready for direct integration into your production line.
Flat · Dome · Embossed · Stamped to spec
04
Deep Drawn Bowls & Vessels
Controlled deep-draw forming of round stainless steel into precise 3D cavity geometries. Inner liners, vessels and housings — multiple tonnage presses, tight tolerances, any shape.
Custom geometry · Multi-tonnage · Tight tolerances
05
Multi-cooker & Steamer Components
Precision-perforated inserts for idli makers, dhokla steamers and multi-tier cookers. Uniform perforation across every unit, consistent cavity geometry, stackable format. Custom dimensions per OEM spec.
Idli · Dhokla · Steamer trays · Perforated · Custom dims
Core Product

Any Pattern.
Any Size.
Built In-House.

These six plates are examples of what we've made. They are not a catalogue. Every induction base plate we manufacture starts from your drawing, your sample, or your dimension — and ends at approved production output.

Pattern 01
125 · 130 · 161 · 178 · 191 · 203 mm

125 · 140 · 165 · 180 mm

Don't see your pattern? That's the point.

Send us a drawing, a sample, or just a dimension. We develop the tooling in-house, make a sample for your approval, then move to bulk production. No third-party toolmaker. No IP risk. No delays.

Send Us Your Spec →
⊙
Diameter & Thickness
Any diameter from small sauce pans to large kadhai. Thickness optimised for bond strength per your cookware base.
◈
Surface Pattern
Dots, grooves, radial slots, mixed perforation, plain disc or your own pattern. We press it in-house.
◻
Edge Profile & Center
Edge rim, center hole size, rim geometry — all to your exact tolerance. Consistent across every batch.
⚙
In-house Tooling
Every custom order uses dies we build ourselves. Faster cycles, lower tooling cost, your design stays private.
How We Work

From Your Drawing
to Delivered Parts

Four steps. No third-party toolmaker. No surprises.

1
You Share the Spec
Engineering drawing, physical sample, or a written dimension. We work from whatever you have.
2
We Build the Tooling
Die and tool development entirely in-house. Faster, cheaper, and your IP never leaves our factory.
3
Sample & Approval
We produce a prototype batch. You inspect, test, approve. No bulk production until you sign off.
4
Bulk OEM Production
High-volume output with multi-stage quality checks at every stage. Delivered on schedule.
Why Jagruti

We Don't Sell Cookware.
We Make It Work.

"Our name doesn't appear on your product. But our precision is in every piece."

We manufacture the components that cookware brands assemble into finished products. Induction base plates, lids, deep drawn vessels, steamer inserts. Fifty years of one focus: cookware components. Nothing else.

Supplying India's leading cookware brands across non-stick, aluminium and pressure cooker categories — long-term OEM relationships built on delivery consistency and dimensional accuracy.

01
Custom Tooling — Fully In-house
No external toolmaker. Every die we build stays on our floor. Faster development, lower cost, your design stays private.
02
Any Spec — We Build It
Diameter, pattern, edge, center hole. If it's a round stamped component, we make it. Bring us a drawing or a sample.
03
Bulk Capacity at OEM Scale
Multiple presses running in parallel. High-volume programs delivered on schedule. Your production line doesn't wait.
04
50 Years. One Focus.
Cookware component manufacturing since 1974. Institutional knowledge that no newer vendor can match.
Who We Serve

India & Global Markets

Trusted by cookware manufacturers across India's major production clusters. Now actively expanding global supply — exporting to EU, Turkey, Vietnam and the Middle East.
